strengths: Strong data analysis and SQL/Python skills
Proven reporting automation and accuracy improvements
Advanced Excel and Power BI reporting
Experience with data quality and governance
weaknesses: Limited explicit corporate finance/financial modeling detail
No direct AI model evaluation experience
No explicit benchmarking for AI financial tasks
No mention of asynchronous contractor work
improvement_bullets: Developed robust financial modeling and automated benchmarks to assess AI-generated data accuracy, ensuring high-fidelity reporting for cross-functional stakeholders.
Translated complex business data into structured financial analysis to improve AI model performance and provide actionable feedback for internal research teams.
Collaborated with subject matter experts to establish data governance frameworks, aligning AI-generated content with standard corporate finance and reporting benchmarks.
Optimized financial statement analysis workflows using Python and SQL, delivering asynchronous reports that met tight deadlines and improved overall data quality.
Applied over two years of professional experience in data-driven operations and financial reporting to evaluate and validate complex datasets against business requirements.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Corporate Finance Expert | Upto $100/hr opportunity with Mercor. I am interested in this opportunity because of Mercor's mission to bridge the gap between elite human talent and the cutting-edge development of AI research labs. What interests me about working for Mercor is its innovative approach to AI-driven talent and content generation, which intrigues me because of my own background in leveraging automation to optimize business intelligence and model reliability. I believe my experience in high-impact financial analysis and my ability to build robust data benchmarks would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on data integrity and analytical precision. In fact, at Shine Masters, I developed statistical models and automated reporting workflows that served as the 'single source of truth' for business stakeholders, ensuring that financial reporting was accurate and compliant. As a result, I achieved a 300% increase in revenue within targeted segments and saved 8 hours of manual data entry per week, showcasing an ability to deliver measurable financial impact. Ultimately, I know that the Corporate Finance Expert role at Mercor would allow me to bring my data validation expertise to improving AI model outputs and training data quality. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my financial reporting skills. I managed the end-to-end process of translating complex technical findings into business recommendations, which directly aligns with the need to provide structured feedback to AI research teams. My success in standardizing KPIs and reducing reporting discrepancies mirrors the rigor required to build benchmarks for assessing AI financial tasks. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in automated reporting and data governance in working on improving AI model performance at Mercor. I know that my proficiency in financial analysis and my technical aptitude in Python/SQL align with what it takes to succeed at the Corporate Finance Expert role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
